title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE BACUNGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 PALANDOK ANNEX IN BARANGAY PALANDOK, MUNICIPALITY OF LEON B. POSTIGO, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE FROM THE BACUNGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PALANDOK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3652; 112 OG No. 7, 738 (February 15, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10721, December 29, 2015 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE BACUNGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 PALANDOK ANNEX IN BARANGAY PALANDOK, MUNICIPALITY OF LEON B. POSTIGO, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE FROM THE BACUNGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PALANDOK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

芒聙聯 The Bacungan National High School芒聙聯Palandok Annex in Barangay Palandok, Municipality of Leon B. Postigo, Province of Zamboanga del Norte is hereby separated from the Bacungan National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Palandok National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聯 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Bacungan National High School芒聙聯Palandok Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Palandok National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s program the operationalization of the Palandok National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s appropriation of the Bacungan National High School 芒聙聯 Palandok Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

芒聙聯 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(SGD.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 4, 2014 and October 6, 2015, respectively.

(SGD.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: DEC 29 2015

(SGD.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
